name: AnkiMobile Flashcards
oneLiner: AnkiMobile — официальный iOS-клиент Anki: интервальное повторение (SRS) с полной кастомизацией колод
pricing: платное приложение ~$24.99 разово, без подписки (по отзывам)
keyFeatures: Spaced repetition (SRS) engine synced with desktop Anki and AnkiWeb
Full deck customization: card templates, fields, scheduling parameters
Supports images, audio, LaTeX; handwriting input on iPad
AnkiWeb sync across devices; community shared decks
One-time purchase funds the open-source ecosystem
